productDisplayName: UCB Women's Short Sleeve Blue Red T-shirt
description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt with mega sleeves, made of 100% viscose, with graphic print and lettering on the front, very lightly ribbed neckline and cuff, and a pleat at the backFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water at 30 degrees inside out, using a mild detergent Do not scrub or bleach Do not tumble dry Do not wring or dry in direct sunlight Dry flat in shade inside out Cool iron inside out Do not iron directly on print/embroidery/sequence/beads Do not dry clean Smart meets cute and saucy in this blue t-shirt from the united colors of benetton. With adorable mega sleeves and a funky graphic print, this tee will take you higher up on the fashion chart. Pair it with jeans or shorts for a completely laid back look.
